result:
All changes are complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Changes Made

### 1. `gradle/libs.versions.toml` - Version bump
- Changed `androidxActivity` from `"1.9.3"` to `"1.10.1"`

### 2. `core/ui/compose/common/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/core/ui/compose/common/activity/LocalActivity.kt` - Replaced custom implementation
- Removed the custom `staticCompositionLocalOf<ComponentActivity>` definition
- Removed the `setActivityContent` extension function
- Replaced with a `@Deprecated` val that re-exports `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity`
- This keeps backward compatibility for the test file that still imports from this package

### 3. Activity files - Replaced `setActivityContent` with `setContent`
Since `setContent` in AndroidX Activity 1.10.1 automatically provides `LocalActivity`, the custom `setActivityContent` wrapper (which manually used `CompositionLocalProvider`) is no longer needed:
- `feature/launcher/src/main/kotlin/.../FeatureLauncherActivity.kt`
- `feature/migration/qrcode/src/main/kotlin/.../QrCodeScannerActivity.kt`
- `app-ui-catalog/src/main/java/.../CatalogActivity.kt`

### 4. Composable files - Updated imports
Replaced `import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity` with `import androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` in:
- `feature/launcher/.../FeatureLauncherApp.kt`
- `feature/launcher/.../FeatureLauncherNavHost.kt`
- `feature/funding/googleplay/.../ContributionScreen.kt`
- `feature/settings/import/.../SettingsImportScreen.kt`
- `feature/account/server/settings/.../TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric.kt`
- `feature/account/server/settings/.../ClientCertificateInput.kt`
